findings.message: References experts/iam_expert.md and experts/api_expert.md; neither file exists; iam_expert was merged into experts/security_unified_expert.md and api_expert was merged into experts/integration_expert.md in a prior refactor

CLAUDE.md instructs Claude to run taskkill /F on python.exe, node.exe, bash.exe, git.exe, grep.exe, cmd.exe, and powershell.exe at the end of every task; this terminates all matching processes system-wide regardless of whether they belong to the plugin or to unrelated user work; the NUL KILLER V2.0 block uses ctypes.windll.kernel32.DeleteFileW on user home directories
Header section reads '44 Totali' but footer reads '43 agents total (6 L0 + 22 L1 + 15 L2)'; the math 6+22+15=43 is correct; header is off by one
CLAUDE.md contains two conflicting agent counts in the same file: header says 44, footer says 43; creates confusion about the canonical agent count
Frontmatter declares name and description but omits model; routing tables indicate this agent should use haiku but that is expressed only in inline documentation, not in machine-readable frontmatter
Frontmatter declares name and description but omits model; routing tables indicate sonnet but that is not in frontmatter
Frontmatter declares name and description but omits model; routing tables indicate sonnet but that is not in frontmatter
Frontmatter declares name and description but omits model; routing tables indicate haiku but that is not in frontmatter
INTEGRATION_REPORT.md documents 11 expert agents (V5.1 integration) while the current system has 22 L1 experts; the architecture diagram and integration metrics are approximately 50% behind reality
Contains five broken expert file references: experts/api_expert.md, experts/mql5_expert.md, experts/pyqt5_expert.md, experts/python_expert.md, experts/iam_expert.md; all were renamed in V6+ refactors

Agent contains explicit instructions for bypassing MetaTrader EA copy protections: account number validation bypass, HWID fingerprinting removal, trial/expiry check removal, broker restriction bypass, and demo-mode removal; references EX4-TO-MQL, IDA Pro, Ghidra, x64dbg, OllyDbg for protection circumvention; distributing these instructions in a public plugin enables DMCA-violating usage at scale

Agent references Cobalt Strike, Sliver C2, and explicit EDR/AV bypass techniques for red-team operations; no authorization gate exists between the agent and any end user; public plugin distribution means any user who installs it gets an AI configured to provide detailed offensive toolchain guidance

MCP server args contain a hardcoded absolute Windows path c:\Users\LeoDg\.claude\... which breaks the MCP server for every user that is not the developer; all non-developer installs silently fail to start the MCP server

args array contains c:\Users\LeoDg\.claude\plugins\orchestrator-plugin\mcp_server\server.py which does not exist on any machine except the developer's; MCP server fails to start on all user installs; this is a ship-blocking defect

Step 2 of the installer runs `curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh` without checksum verification; a compromised CDN or MitM response executes arbitrary code with user privileges at install time

cleanup_orphan_processes() calls subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True) on a hardcoded cmd string; while not currently user-influenced, shell=True widens the injection surface and is unnecessary when cmd can be expressed as a list

Module docstring says 'Total Agents: 36 (6 Core + 15 L1 Expert + 15 L2 Sub-Agent)' and the orchestrator_config resource returns total_agents:36; actual deployed count is 43; the 7 experts added after V6 (reverse_engineering, offensive_security, mql_decompilation, browser_automation, mcp_integration, notification, payment_integration) are not in KEYWORD_TO_EXPERT_MAPPING and are unreachable via MCP routing

postinstall script runs `npm run build` (tsc + copy-assets) automatically on every npm install; enables arbitrary code execution at install time if a dependency is compromised or a malicious version is published

MCP server args contain a hardcoded absolute Windows path c:\Users\LeoDg\.claude\... which breaks the MCP server for every user that is not the developer; all non-developer installs silently fail to start the MCP server

Step 2 of the installer runs `curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh` without checksum verification; a compromised CDN or MitM response executes arbitrary code with user privileges at install time

postinstall script runs `npm run build` (tsc + copy-assets) automatically on every npm install; enables arbitrary code execution at install time if a dependency is compromised or a malicious version is published

cleanup_orphan_processes() calls subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True) on a hardcoded cmd string; while not currently user-influenced, shell=True widens the injection surface and is unnecessary when cmd can be expressed as a list

Agent contains explicit instructions for bypassing MetaTrader EA copy protections: account number validation bypass, HWID fingerprinting removal, trial/expiry check removal, broker restriction bypass, and demo-mode removal; references EX4-TO-MQL, IDA Pro, Ghidra, x64dbg, OllyDbg for protection circumvention; distributing these instructions in a public plugin enables DMCA-violating usage at scale

Agent references Cobalt Strike, Sliver C2, and explicit EDR/AV bypass techniques for red-team operations; no authorization gate exists between the agent and any end user; public plugin distribution means any user who installs it gets an AI configured to provide detailed offensive toolchain guidance

CLAUDE.md instructs Claude to run taskkill /F on python.exe, node.exe, bash.exe, git.exe, grep.exe, cmd.exe, and powershell.exe at the end of every task; this terminates all matching processes system-wide regardless of whether they belong to the plugin or to unrelated user work; the NUL KILLER V2.0 block uses ctypes.windll.kernel32.DeleteFileW on user home directories

args array contains c:\Users\LeoDg\.claude\plugins\orchestrator-plugin\mcp_server\server.py which does not exist on any machine except the developer's; MCP server fails to start on all user installs; this is a ship-blocking defect
